name: Fast Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:10
Combine the first five ingredients in a large saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring gently; boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Add chocolate morsels to marshmallow mixture, stirring until melted. Add pecans and vanilla, stirring well. Spread evenly in a buttered 8-inch square pan. Cool and cut into squares. Yield: 2 pounds.
